description: CompositionYellow round neck T-shirt made of 100% organic cotton, has fabric tape detailing on the in-seam of the neckline, short sleeves and graphic print below the nape of the neckFitRegularWash careWash in cold waterDry in shadeIron on reverse of designHalloween does not have to come only once a year when you have humour on your mind. Time to show off your fun side with this stylish t-shirt from chimp. The graphic logo “Dracular and sons” adds an edge to this tee while the soft cotton fabric gives you exemplary comfort. Pair this with denims and canvas shoes.Model StatisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height:6” and shoulders 18”
